title: 謎の天才ゲーマーを追え！

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! This can't be real. No one's got aim like
that...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Just who is this "MightyMe"?! Damn it, I
don't stand a chance!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? How can you even get that high of a score?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
How many chain combos do you have to rack up?
This "MightyMe" is no joke.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... "MightyMe"... Where have I seen that before?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey... Did you just say "MightyMe"?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? What if I did? Has nothing to do with you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It does too... Wait, is it your player tag?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wha?! You know about them too?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So on top of shooters, they know their way
around puzzle games, too. They must be a genius.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It just came back to me. I feel like I've seen this
gamertag in real life before...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! Where?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I think it was a dance game in the mall arcade.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So going there could be our ticket to finding out
their identity.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
We're here, but... doesn't this make us kinda
creepy?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Now you say this, when we're so close to solving
the mystery... There's no reason we should quit.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, no, but—hey, there's a crowd forming...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two turn around only to see a single
Umamusume drawing in a group of onlookers.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that was fun! Games that get you moving
are the best! ♪

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
MightyMe just got a new high score! Wow, gods
really live among us...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
But it's a bit of a shame. You won't see any
competitors stepping up to the challenge with a
score like that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...So they say, but what do you think? Wanna
take on the so-called "god"?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, if she's not using any cheats, then
statistically I have a chance of winning. What
about you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm... just gonna keep aiming for the top score,
like I always do.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Cool. I think we've got ourselves a game then.
